Additional Considerations:
The query involves specific historical data (2016 season), so accuracy is critical. The Generalist_Solution_Generator_Tool should be avoided due to its high risk of hallucination on specific factual queries. Web_RAG_Search_Tool is less suitable as a first step since a specific URL is not provided.
- **Memory (Tools Used & Results):** {'Action Step 1': {'tool_name': 'Ground_Google_Search_Tool', 'sub_goal': 'Search the web to identify the specific college football team coached by Bob Stoops that defeated the 2016 Auburn Tigers.', 'command': 'execution = tool.execute(query="Which Bob Stoops coached team beat the 2016 Auburn Tigers football team?")', 'result': ['The Bob Stoops-coached team that beat the 2016 Auburn Tigers football team was the **Oklahoma Sooners**.[1](https://www.foxnews.com/sports/mayfield-perine-lead-oklahoma-to-35-19-sugar-bowl-win-over-auburn), [2](https://www.reddit.com/r/huskies/comments/qxk0kw/coaching_profile_bob_stoops/)

The No. 7 ranked Oklahoma Sooners defeated the No. 17 ranked Auburn Tigers 35-19 in the Sugar Bowl on January 2, 2017.[1](https://www.foxnews.com/sports/mayfield-perine-lead-oklahoma-to-35-19-sugar-bowl-win-over-auburn), [3](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SZVRhaTsbLg), [4](https://www.foxsports.com/stories/college-football/baker-mayfield-shines-as-oklahoma-flies-past-auburn-for-sugar-bowl-win) Bob Stoops was the head coach for the Oklahoma Sooners from 1999 through the 2016 season.[5](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Stoops), [6](https://grokipedia.com/page/Bob_Stoops), [7](https://www.si.com/fannation/college/cfb-hq/news/legendary-college-football-coach-retires-42-years-after-first-job-bob-stoops)']}}

-   If more information is needed, explain what's missing, which tools could help, and conclude with "CONTINUE".

IMPORTANT: The response must end with either "Conclusion: STOP" or "Conclusion: CONTINUE".

result:
The Bob Stoops-coached team that beat the 2016 Auburn Tigers football team was the **Oklahoma Sooners**.[1](https://www.foxnews.com/sports/mayfield-perine-lead-oklahoma-to-35-19-sugar-bowl-win-over-auburn), [2](https://www.reddit.com/r/huskies/comments/qxk0kw/coaching_profile_bob_stoops/)

The No. 7 ranked Oklahoma Sooners defeated the No. 17 ranked Auburn Tigers 35-19 in the Sugar Bowl on January 2, 2017.[1](https://www.foxnews.com/sports/mayfield-perine-lead-oklahoma-to-35-19-sugar-bowl-win-over-auburn), [3](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SZVRhaTsbLg), [4](https://www.foxsports.com/stories/college-football/baker-mayfield-shines-as-oklahoma-flies-past-auburn-for-sugar-bowl-win) Bob Stoops was the head coach for the Oklahoma Sooners from 1999 through the 2016 season.[5](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Stoops), [6](https://grokipedia.com/page/Bob_Stoops), [7](https://www.si.com/fannation/college/cfb-hq/news/legendary-college-football-coach-retires-42-years-after-first-job-bob-stoops)

direct_output:
**Process Summary:**
1.  **Query Analysis:** The user asked to identify the specific college football team coached by Bob Stoops that defeated the 2016 Auburn Tigers.
2.  **Information Retrieval:** A web search was conducted using the `Ground_Google_Search_Tool` to find historical game results involving Bob Stoops and the 2016 Auburn Tigers.
3.  **Result Verification:** The search results confirmed that the Oklahoma Sooners, under head coach Bob Stoops, defeated the Auburn Tigers. The specific game was the Sugar Bowl played on January 2, 2017, where Oklahoma won 35-19. This was Stoops' final season as head coach.
4.  **Synthesis:** The findings were synthesized to confirm that the Oklahoma Sooners are the correct team, satisfying all conditions of the query (Bob Stoops as coach, defeated Auburn, 2016 season context).

<answer>The Oklahoma Sooners</answer>
